title: Workload v1
description: Schema for an inference workload definition within the Tribunus Inference Research Evidence Plane. Describes the prompt, sampler configuration, and execution constraints for a reproducible inference task.

workload_id.description: Unique identifier for this workload definition.

tokenizer_id.description: Identifier of the tokenizer to use.

source_text.description: Human-readable source text of the prompt (optional, for interpretability).

prompt_length.description: Number of tokens in the prompt.

output_budget.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate.

expected_deterministic_tokens.description: Number of tokens expected to be deterministic given the sampler config (optional).

eos_behavior.description: Behavior when an end-of-sequence token is encountered.

context_policy.description: Policy for context window management (e.g. truncate_left, sliding_window, extend).

required_checkpoints.description: List of checkpoint identifiers required before running this workload.
